mapper.select: SELECT user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_nm_eng, brdt, user_id, pswd, user_authrt, user_type, user_stts, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) AS eml_lcal, eml_dmn, mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}) AS mpno_mid, mpno_sfx, inst_oid, inst_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm, jbps_cd, jbps_nm, last_login_dt, lgn_fail_cnt, prvc_use_yn, prvc_start_dt, prvc_end_dt, prvc_reg_id, prvc_pvsn_agre_yn, tdpty_pvsn_agre_yn, cnsgn_pvsn_agre_yn, trms_agre_yn, eml_rcptn_agre_yn, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_nm_eng, brdt, user_id, pswd, user_authrt, user_type, user_stts, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) AS eml_lcal, eml_dmn, mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}) AS mpno_mid, mpno_sfx, inst_oid, inst_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm, jbps_cd, jbps_nm, last_login_dt, lgn_fail_cnt, prvc_use_yn, prvc_start_dt, prvc_end_dt, prvc_reg_id, prvc_pvsn_agre_yn, tdpty_pvsn_agre_yn, cnsgn_pvsn_agre_yn, trms_agre_yn, eml_rcptn_agre_yn, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_nm_eng, brdt, user_id, pswd, user_authrt, user_type, user_stts, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) AS eml_lcal, eml_dmn, mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}) AS mpno_mid, mpno_sfx, inst_oid, inst_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm, jbps_cd, jbps_nm, last_login_dt, lgn_fail_cnt, prvc_use_yn, prvc_start_dt, prvc_end_dt, prvc_reg_id, prvc_pvsn_agre_yn, tdpty_pvsn_agre_yn, cnsgn_pvsn_agre_yn, trms_agre_yn, eml_rcptn_agre_yn, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND use_yn = 'Y' AND user_authrt = 'ADMIN'

SELECT user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_nm_eng, brdt, user_id, pswd, user_authrt, user_type, user_stts, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) AS eml_lcal, eml_dmn, mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}) AS mpno_mid, mpno_sfx, inst_oid, inst_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm, jbps_cd, jbps_nm, last_login_dt, lgn_fail_cnt, prvc_use_yn, prvc_start_dt, prvc_end_dt, prvc_reg_id, prvc_pvsn_agre_yn, tdpty_pvsn_agre_yn, cnsgn_pvsn_agre_yn, trms_agre_yn, eml_rcptn_agre_yn, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user WHERE CONCAT(${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}), '@', eml_dmn) = CAST(CONCAT(#{emlLcal}, '@', #{emlDmn}) AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_nm_eng, brdt, user_id, pswd, user_authrt, user_type, user_stts, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) AS eml_lcal, eml_dmn, mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}) AS mpno_mid, mpno_sfx, inst_oid, inst_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm, jbps_cd, jbps_nm, last_login_dt, lgn_fail_cnt, prvc_use_yn, prvc_start_dt, prvc_end_dt, prvc_reg_id, prvc_pvsn_agre_yn, tdpty_pvsn_agre_yn, cnsgn_pvsn_agre_yn, trms_agre_yn, eml_rcptn_agre_yn, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_oid = #{userOid} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT user_id FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_nm_korn = #{request.userName} AND CONCAT( ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}), '@', eml_dmn ) = CAST(#{request.email} AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND CONCAT( mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}), mpno_sfx ) = CAST(#{request.phoneNumber} AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.tb_verification_token ( user_id, token, expiry_date, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{token}, #{expiryDate}, 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, token, expiry_date AS expiryDate, status FROM ${schema}.tb_verification_token WHERE token = #{token} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.tb_password_reset_token ( user_id, token, expiry_date, verification_token, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{token}, #{expiryDate}, #{verificationToken}, 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, token, expiry_date AS expiryDate, verification_token AS verificationToken, status FROM ${schema}.tb_password_reset_token WHERE token = #{token} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.user SET pswd = #{encPswd}, mdfcn_dt = NOW(), mdfcn_id = 'SYSTEM', lgn_fail_cnt = 0 WHERE user_oid = #{userOid} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.user( user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_nm_eng, brdt, user_id, pswd, user_authrt, user_type, user_stts, eml_lcal, eml_dmn, mpno_pfx, mpno_mid, mpno_sfx, inst_oid, inst_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm, jbps_cd, jbps_nm, lgn_fail_cnt, prvc_use_yn, prvc_pvsn_agre_yn, tdpty_pvsn_agre_yn, cnsgn_pvsn_agre_yn, trms_agre_yn, eml_rcptn_agre_yn, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt ) VALUES( #{userOid}, #{userNmKorn}, #{userNmEng}, #{brdt}, #{userId}, #{pswd}, ifnull(#{userAuthrt}, 'ADMIN'), #{userType}, #{userStts}, #{emlLcal}, #{emlDmn}, #{mpnoPfx}, #{mpnoMid}, #{mpnoSfx}, #{instOid}, #{instNm}, #{deptCd}, #{deptNm}, #{jbpsCd}, #{jbpsNm}, ifnull(#{lgnFailCnt}, 0), #{prvcUseYn}, #{prvcPvsnAgreYn}, #{tdptyPvsnAgreYn}, #{cnsgnPvsnAgreYn}, #{trmsAgreYn}, #{emlRcptnAgreYn}, ifnull(#{useYn}, 'Y'), ifnull(#{regId}, 'SYSTEM'), ifnull(#{regDt}, now()), ifnull(#{mdfcnId}, 'SYSTEM'), ifnull(#{mdfcnDt}, now()) )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.user WHERE CONCAT(${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{aesKey}), '@', eml_dmn) = CONCAT(CAST(#{request.emlLcal} AS CHAR) collate utf8mb4_unicode_ci, '@', #{request.emlDmn})
AND user_oid != #{request.userOid}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.user WHERE CONCAT(mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{aesKey}), mpno_sfx) = CAST(CONCAT(#{request.mpnoPfx}, #{request.mpnoMid}, #{request.mpnoSfx}) AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
AND user_oid != #{request.userOid}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.user SET
user_nm_korn = #{request.userNmKorn},
user_nm_eng = #{request.userNmEng},
brdt = #{request.brdt},
eml_lcal = #{request.emlLcal},
eml_dmn = #{request.emlDmn},
mpno_pfx = #{request.mpnoPfx},
mpno_mid = #{request.mpnoMid},
mpno_sfx = #{request.mpnoSfx},
dept_nm = #{request.deptNm},
jbps_nm = #{request.jbpsNm},
mdfcn_id = #{principal.userId}, mdfcn_dt = IFNULL(#{request.mdfcnDt}, now()) WHERE user_oid = #{principal.userOid} AND user_id = #{principal.userId}

UPDATE ${schema}.user SET pswd = #{request.newPswd}, mdfcn_id = #{principal.userId}, mdfcn_dt = IFNULL(#{request.mdfcnDt}, now()) WHERE user_oid = #{principal.userOid} AND user_id = #{principal.userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_id, pswd, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) AS eml_lcal, eml_dmn FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_id = #{request.userId} AND user_nm_korn = #{request.userName} AND ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) = CAST(#{request.emlLcal} AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND eml_dmn = #{request.emlDmn} AND mpno_pfx = #{request.mpnoPfx} AND ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}) = CAST(#{request.mpnoMid} AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND mpno_sfx = #{request.mpnoSfx} AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.user SET pswd = #{password}, mdfcn_id = 'SYSTEM', mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE user_oid = #{userOid}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_nm_korn = #{request.userName} AND CONCAT( ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}), '@', eml_dmn ) = CAST(#{request.email} AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND CONCAT( mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}), mpno_sfx ) = CAST(#{request.phoneNumber} AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND use_yn = 'Y' AND user_authrt = 'ADMIN'

SELECT user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_id, pswd, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) AS eml_lcal, eml_dmn FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_id = #{request.userId} AND user_nm_korn = #{request.userName} AND ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) = CAST(#{request.emlLcal} AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND eml_dmn = #{request.emlDmn} AND mpno_pfx = #{request.mpnoPfx} AND ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}) = CAST(#{request.mpnoMid} AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND mpno_sfx = #{request.mpnoSfx} AND use_yn = 'Y' AND user_authrt = 'ADMIN' LIMIT 1
